mean_en: a person or thing that has the same position or function as somebody/something else in a different place or situation
sentence: Our manager will meet her counterpart from another company tomorrow.
sentence_trans: 我们的经理明天将与另一家公司的对等经理会面。
word_etyma: counter相对应 + part部分，分开 → 对应的一部分 → counterpart相对物；副本
